original_statement: who was ambassador after jeanette w. hyde?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Noun generalization: "jeanette w. hyde" (proper PERSON name) → "someone" | "ambassador" (specific role/noun) → "something"

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的描述（“Explanation: Brent Hardt served... The next entry shows Christopher Sandrolini served...”以及判定为[Correct]）可以看出agent直接把变异问题理解为原始具体问题并给出具体人名答案。日志中没有任何关于问题不明确、需要澄清或询问用户的表述，亦未使用ambiguous、unclear等词汇。agent的具体表现是直接执行检索(simple_query)并返回确定性结论，体现出将模糊指令当作明确指令处理，因此归入“无法意识到指令模糊”。
